race.description: Affinty Roofing New England Country Boosted Handicap
race.comment: BRIGHELLA (8) in career best form and can bounce back over this trip. Failed to see the 1200m out with a gritty second at this track from the awkward draw. Reith sticks and shapes as a genuine top-three player. EQUITABLE (5) scored his Maiden win at start six over this track and trip. Can go on with the job now from the good draw. OUR EMILY (10) had mixed luck in three runs back and the latest run had merit when she closed well to finish fourth over 1000m at Port Macquarie. Well placed in this suitable race. ARDONAUGH (4) gets in light again with the claim after she griped on late with a narrow fourth over 1150m at Beaumont (Newcastle). Minor claims from the barrier.
